form.formComment: Well supported last time and ran up to expectations, burning early to score a 3.5 lengths win at this track over 350m in 19.58. Has won three races from this box. Expected to feature.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Well supported last time and ran up to expectations, burning early to score a 3.5 lengths win at this track over 350m in 19.58. Has won three races from this box. Expected to feature.

form.formComment: Was out of placings last time (22.71) at Shepparton in a Grade 4, finishing fifth and beaten 8 lengths. Has two wins and two placings from eight starts from the draw. With a clean break looks hard to beat.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Was out of placings last time (22.71) at Shepparton in a Grade 4, finishing fifth and beaten 8 lengths. Has two wins and two placings from eight starts from the draw. With a clean break looks hard to beat.

form.formComment: Won two starts back when well in the market at this track over 300m. Last start finished 2nd over 390m at Ballarat beaten 2.75 lengths (22.38) behind Kensington Flyer in a Grade 5 on April 6. Has run very fast time at this course and distance. Worth including.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Won two starts back when well in the market at this track over 300m. Last start finished 2nd over 390m at Ballarat beaten 2.75 lengths (22.38) behind Kensington Flyer in a Grade 5 on April 6. Has run very fast time at this course and distance. Worth including.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Slow to begin; Raced wide in home straight; Proved difficult to box.

form.formComment: Last start finished eighth on March 27 over 300m at this track behind Exaggerator, beaten 10 lengths (17.52) in a Grade 4/5. This looks too tough.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Last start finished eighth on March 27 over 300m at this track behind Exaggerator, beaten 10 lengths (17.52) in a Grade 4/5. This looks too tough.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Began awkwardly and slow to begin; Lost ground soon after.
Checked and fell on first turn.

form.formComment: Surprised two starts back at this track to win by 1.5 lengths in 16.53, beating Electra Opal. Last start finished last on March 27 over 300m at this track behind Especial Kai beaten 6 lengths (17.20) in a Free For All. Look for improvement. Not out of it.

formComments.comment: Surprised two starts back at this track to win by 1.5 lengths in 16.53, beating Electra Opal. Last start finished last on March 27 over 300m at this track behind Especial Kai beaten 6 lengths (17.20) in a Free For All. Look for improvement. Not out of it.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Quick to begin and raced wide.

form.formComment: Was a winner three back at this track then finished in the minors before missing the frame last time when eighth (23.13) at Shepparton. Looks a leading contender on best and expected to bounce back.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Was a winner three back at this track then finished in the minors before missing the frame last time when eighth (23.13) at Shepparton. Looks a leading contender on best and expected to bounce back.

form.formComment: Has finished seventh at her last couple of starts, most recently at Sale over 435m. Can't make much of a case this time.

formComments.comment: Has finished seventh at her last couple of starts, most recently at Sale over 435m. Can't make much of a case this time.

form.formComment: Should get a clear run from the wide draw. Wasn't impressive last start but does have a great record at this track and distance, on best form is more than capable. Keep safe.
